Class ConversationNodeHook

SuzerainModdingKit.dll

Hook configuration for a ConversationNode.

Constructors

ConversationNodeHook(ConversationNodeSelector, HookMode, HookPriority)

Create a new instance of this class.

public ConversationNodeHook(ConversationNodeSelector selector, ConversationNodeHook.HookMode mode = HookMode.Split, ConversationNodeHook.HookPriority priority = HookPriority.Normal)

Parameters

selector ConversationNodeSelector

The selector to select the node to hook to.

mode ConversationNodeHook.HookMode

Optional: The mode to use. Default: Split.

priority ConversationNodeHook.HookPriority

Optional: The priority of this hook. Default: Normal.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if any required arguments are null.

Mode

The mode to use.
